mentions.note: Polyolefins (polyethylene) manufacturer; chemical play working well. Cramer gives thumbs up, home run.
Commodity stocks soaring due to polyethylene supply loss from Middle East disruption; not a conviction call given war uncertainty.
Petrochemical producer in Chem7; benefits from bombing scenario but limited shelf life if peace breaks out.
Petrochemical up 86% Q1 on Iran strait closure supply shock; already bouncing Jan before war on rate-cut hopes; at risk of pullback if war ends and strait reopens.
Inexpensive at six times earnings with a 5% yield and should bounce, but it's a China-dependent commodity name — sell into any strength.
